name: 04-30-prompt-composer-style-dials-mvp
title: Prompt Composer and Style Dials MVP
description: 保留 owner-facing prompt layer preview 和安全风格拨盘任务。
creator: lijin
notes: Completed frontend-only Prompt Composer / Style Dials MVP in CharacterEditor: owner-only layer preview, safe style dial compilation into existing system_prompt, no schema/API/storage changes, with unit/static test plus desktop/mobile Playwright self-acceptance.

completed_scope: Owner-facing prompt layer preview for platform boundary, TavernCharacter, style dials, world info, and visitor state.
Safe style dial definitions and idempotent managed system_prompt block application.
CharacterEditor UI integration and mobile-responsive styling.
Unit/static verification and Playwright desktop/mobile self-acceptance artifacts.
deferred_not_done: No backend/API/storage/schema persistence for style dials.
No AI generation or automatic tavern/NPC/story publication.
No token billing, visitor social/ranking/combat, or other out-of-scope platform features.
verification: npm --prefix .\frontend run typecheck; npm --prefix .\frontend run build
